chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-2999 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. 07.08.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Hassan Ahmed, Advocate for KMC. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, AAG. --------------------- Learned counsel for the KMC files a Statement along with a Letter dated 05.08.32025, which are taken on record. He further submits that the entire dues will be paid to the Petitioner within 30 days. After such Statement, learned counsel for the Petitioner seeks disposal of the instant Petition. In view of the above, instant Petition is disposed of with direction to the Respondent to pay the entire dues to Petitioner within 30 days, in case of failure, contempt proceeding may be initiated against the concerned. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
